markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Define the content review process and clarify team roles for the 8-week sprint.](https://fathom.video/share/n4yALRQbhd4dxTpYehiAgwo-EjcFhyuj?tab=summary&timestamp=35.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Single Approver:** John will designate one person (likely Chanel) as the sole content approver to prevent review delays, which are critical for the rapid 8-week sprint.](https://fathom.video/share/n4yALRQbhd4dxTpYehiAgwo-EjcFhyuj?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)
  - [**Calendar Alignment:** GrowthX needs access to Mariel's content calendar to align strategies and avoid duplicating effort.](https://fathom.video/share/n4yALRQbhd4dxTpYehiAgwo-EjcFhyuj?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)
  - [**Role Definition:** Mariel's team will focus on deep, proprietary content, while GrowthX will execute the approved topic clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/n4yALRQbhd4dxTpYehiAgwo-EjcFhyuj?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)
  - [**Feedback Protocol:** All content feedback must be provided via Google Docs comments/suggestions to create a clear, auditable trail for calibration.](https://fathom.video/share/n4yALRQbhd4dxTpYehiAgwo-EjcFhyuj?tab=summary&timestamp=1562.0)

## Topics

### Problem: Ambiguous Content Review Process

  - [A single, clear decision-maker is required to prevent review bottlenecks that could derail the 8-week sprint.](https://fathom.video/share/n4yALRQbhd4dxTpYehiAgwo-EjcFhyuj?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
  - [**Rationale:** Past client experiences show that multiple reviewers cause delays of 72+ hours, hindering momentum and making it difficult to prove ROI.](https://fathom.video/share/n4yALRQbhd4dxTpYehiAgwo-EjcFhyuj?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
  - [**Challenge:** John's team has multiple stakeholders (Chanel, James, Mariel) who have historically edited content, creating ambiguity.](https://fathom.video/share/n4yALRQbhd4dxTpYehiAgwo-EjcFhyuj?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)
  - [**Immediate Hurdle:** Chanel's unavailability for two weeks in February for sales kickoffs (Spain, Vegas) requires a backup plan for approvals.](https://fathom.video/share/n4yALRQbhd4dxTpYehiAgwo-EjcFhyuj?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)

### Solution: Defined Roles & Workflow

  - [**Primary Approver:** John will confirm with James and Chanel that Chanel will be the sole approver.](https://fathom.video/share/n4yALRQbhd4dxTpYehiAgwo-EjcFhyuj?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [**Technical Review:** Daniel "Donny" Bagel (PMM, Data Security) will review the first \~8 articles for technical accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/n4yALRQbhd4dxTpYehiAgwo-EjcFhyuj?tab=summary&timestamp=1398.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Donny is the closest person on the team to a technical marketer and can catch inaccuracies before publication.](https://fathom.video/share/n4yALRQbhd4dxTpYehiAgwo-EjcFhyuj?tab=summary&timestamp=1398.0)
  - [**Content Calendar Alignment:**](https://fathom.video/share/n4yALRQbhd4dxTpYehiAgwo-EjcFhyuj?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)
      - [GrowthX requires access to Mariel's 2–3 month content calendar to prevent topic overlap.](https://fathom.video/share/n4yALRQbhd4dxTpYehiAgwo-EjcFhyuj?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)
      - [**Proposed Division of Labor:**](https://fathom.video/share/n4yALRQbhd4dxTpYehiAgwo-EjcFhyuj?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)
          - [**Mariel's Team:** Deep, proprietary content (e.g., "2026 HIPAA Guide") that leverages internal expertise.](https://fathom.video/share/n4yALRQbhd4dxTpYehiAgwo-EjcFhyuj?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)
          - [**GrowthX:** Execution of the approved topic clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/n4yALRQbhd4dxTpYehiAgwo-EjcFhyuj?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
  - [**Feedback Protocol:**](https://fathom.video/share/n4yALRQbhd4dxTpYehiAgwo-EjcFhyuj?tab=summary&timestamp=1562.0)
      - [**Method:** Use Google Docs comments/suggestions, not direct edits.](https://fathom.video/share/n4yALRQbhd4dxTpYehiAgwo-EjcFhyuj?tab=summary&timestamp=1562.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This creates a clear, auditable trail of all changes and the reasoning behind them, which is essential for calibrating the content engine.](https://fathom.video/share/n4yALRQbhd4dxTpYehiAgwo-EjcFhyuj?tab=summary&timestamp=1562.0)

### Team Structure & Contacts

  - [**James:** Owns Growth Marketing (demand side).](https://fathom.video/share/n4yALRQbhd4dxTpYehiAgwo-EjcFhyuj?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [**Chanel:** Owns Product Marketing (under James); likely the content approver.](https://fathom.video/share/n4yALRQbhd4dxTpYehiAgwo-EjcFhyuj?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [**Phil:** Owns Demand Generation (under James), including Mariel's team.](https://fathom.video/share/n4yALRQbhd4dxTpYehiAgwo-EjcFhyuj?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [**Ralph & Connie Gregorian:** SEO team; contact for questions on page optimization and tools like Semrush.](https://fathom.video/share/n4yALRQbhd4dxTpYehiAgwo-EjcFhyuj?tab=summary&timestamp=973.0)
  - [**Istvan:** PMM with expertise in regulatory compliance (e.g., HIPAA, DORA).](https://fathom.video/share/n4yALRQbhd4dxTpYehiAgwo-EjcFhyuj?tab=summary&timestamp=905.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**John:**](https://fathom.video/share/n4yALRQbhd4dxTpYehiAgwo-EjcFhyuj?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
      - [Confirm the primary content approver with James and Chanel.](https://fathom.video/share/n4yALRQbhd4dxTpYehiAgwo-EjcFhyuj?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
      - [Secure access to Mariel's content calendar for GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/n4yALRQbhd4dxTpYehiAgwo-EjcFhyuj?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)
      - [Inform GrowthX of the backup approver for Chanel's two-week absence.](https://fathom.video/share/n4yALRQbhd4dxTpYehiAgwo-EjcFhyuj?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
  - [**Kathy:**](https://fathom.video/share/n4yALRQbhd4dxTpYehiAgwo-EjcFhyuj?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
      - [Send the calibration article link to John and James for detailed feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/n4yALRQbhd4dxTpYehiAgwo-EjcFhyuj?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
      - [Report weekly on content status: delivered, under review, and pending.](https://fathom.video/share/n4yALRQbhd4dxTpYehiAgwo-EjcFhyuj?tab=summary&timestamp=1460.0)
      - [Check with Yusuf on resolving the Slack access issue.](https://fathom.video/share/n4yALRQbhd4dxTpYehiAgwo-EjcFhyuj?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)
